creator: aiza21@comclark.com
text:
Network Communication Kernel PPP and SLIP are obsolete.

Kernel PPP was rewritten and became User PPP back in release 2.1 I believe. It has only been carried forward for backward compatability. 

Slip was never embraced by the ISP community from the very start. In todays world where cable and dsl access is the norm dial up access is hard to find and slip access is not offered at all.
